terms.example_en: The space frame roof spans 100 meters without internal supports.
terms.example_zh: 网架结构屋面可实现100米无支撑跨越。

terms.example_en: The steel truss provides structural support for the bridge.
terms.example_zh: 钢桁架为桥梁提供结构支撑。

terms.example_en: The cable dome creates a tension-integrated roof system.
terms.example_zh: 索穹顶形成张力集成屋盖系统。

terms.example_en: Tensile structures use membranes and cables to create lightweight roofs.
terms.example_zh: 张拉结构使用膜材和索形成轻盈的屋盖。

terms.example_en: The cable-stayed structure is efficient for medium to long spans.
terms.example_zh: 斜拉结构适用于中长跨度。

terms.example_en: Suspension structures are ideal for very long span bridges.
terms.example_zh: 悬索结构是大跨桥梁的理想选择。

terms.example_en: The tension rod system provides support for the long-span roof.
terms.example_zh: 张弦杆系统为大跨度屋盖提供支撑。

terms.example_en: The suspended structure maximizes ground floor space.
terms.example_zh: 悬吊结构最大化首层空间。

terms.example_en: The cable truss combines the advantages of cables and trusses.
terms.example_zh: 索桁架结合了索和桁架的优点。

terms.example_en: Prestressed steel improves structural performance under load.
terms.example_zh: 预应力钢改善了结构在荷载下的性能。

terms.example_en: Welded connections provide excellent structural continuity.
terms.example_zh: 焊接连接提供优异的结构连续性。

terms.example_en: High-strength bolted connections are commonly used in steel structures.
terms.example_zh: 高强度螺栓连接在钢结构中广泛应用。

terms.example_en: Riveted connections were common in historic steel structures.
terms.example_zh: 铆钉连接在历史钢结构中常见。

terms.example_en: Moment connections transfer bending moments between members.
terms.example_zh: 刚接传递构件间的弯矩。

terms.example_en: Pinned connections allow rotation between members.
terms.example_zh: 铰接允许构件间转动。

terms.example_en: Structural steel has high strength and good ductility.
terms.example_zh: 结构钢具有高强度和良好的延性。

terms.example_en: The H-beam is widely used in steel frame construction.
terms.example_zh: H型钢广泛应用于钢框架结构。

terms.example_en: I-beams are commonly used as beams in buildings.
terms.example_zh: 工字钢常用作建筑的梁。

terms.example_en: Box sections have high torsional resistance.
terms.example_zh: 箱形截面具有较高的抗扭性能。

terms.example_en: Steel tubes are used in columns and trusses.
terms.example_zh: 钢管常用于柱和桁架。

terms.example_en: Stainless steel is corrosion-resistant and durable.
terms.example_zh: 不锈钢耐腐蚀且耐用。

terms.example_en: Carbon steel is the most common structural material.
terms.example_zh: 碳素钢是最常见的结构材料。

terms.example_en: Alloy steel has enhanced mechanical properties.
terms.example_zh: 合金钢具有增强的机械性能。

terms.example_en: Frame structures allow for flexible interior layouts.
terms.example_zh: 框架结构允许灵活的内部布局。

terms.example_en: Braced frames provide lateral resistance.
terms.example_zh: 支撑框架提供侧向抵抗力。

terms.example_en: The walls provide load bearing function for the building.
terms.example_zh: 墙体为建筑提供承重功能。

terms.example_en: The span of the bridge is 500 meters.
terms.example_zh: 桥梁跨度为500米。

terms.example_en: Deflection must be within acceptable limits.
terms.example_zh: 挠度必须在允许范围内。

terms.example_en: The stress in the beam is within the allowable limit.
terms.example_zh: 梁内的应力在允许范围内。

terms.example_en: Strain measures the deformation of a material.
terms.example_zh: 应变测量材料的变形。

terms.example_en: Buckling is a failure mode for compression members.
terms.example_zh: 屈曲是受压构件的破坏模式。

terms.example_en: Yield strength is the stress at which material begins to deform plastically.
terms.example_zh: 屈服强度是材料开始塑性变形的应力。

terms.example_en: Ultimate strength is the maximum stress the material can withstand.
terms.example_zh: 极限强度是材料能承受的最大应力。

terms.example_en: Steel erection was completed in three months.
terms.example_zh: 钢结构吊装在三个月内完成。

terms.example_en: Welding is a common method for connecting steel members.
terms.example_zh: 焊接是连接钢构件的常用方法。

terms.example_en: Grouting fills the gap between steel and concrete.
terms.example_zh: 灌浆填充钢与混凝土之间的间隙。

terms.example_en: Cranes are essential for steel erection.
terms.example_zh: 起重机对钢结构吊装至关重要。

terms.example_en: The foundation supports the entire structure.
terms.example_zh: 基础支撑整个结构。

terms.example_en: Column bases connect columns to foundations.
terms.example_zh: 柱脚将柱与基础连接。

terms.example_en: Anchor bolts secure the column to the foundation.
terms.example_zh: 锚栓将柱固定在基础上。

terms.example_en: FEA is used to analyze complex structural behaviors.
terms.example_zh: 有限元分析用于分析复杂结构行为。

terms.example_en: Shear force acts parallel to the cross-section.
terms.example_zh: 剪力平行于横截面作用。

terms.example_en: Bending moment causes the beam to bend.
terms.example_zh: 弯矩使梁弯曲。

terms.example_en: Torsional moment causes twisting.
terms.example_zh: 扭矩引起扭转。

terms.example_en: Lateral loads include wind and seismic forces.
terms.example_zh: 侧向荷载包括风和地震力。

terms.example_en: Seismic design ensures structures can resist earthquakes.
terms.example_zh: 抗震设计确保结构能抵抗地震。

terms.example_en: Fire resistance is critical for steel structures.
terms.example_zh: 耐火性对钢结构至关重要。

terms.example_en: Corrosion weakens steel structures over time.
terms.example_zh: 腐蚀会随时间削弱钢结构。

terms.example_en: Fatigue failure occurs under repeated loading.
terms.example_zh: 疲劳破坏发生在重复荷载作用下。

terms.example_en: Excessive settlement can damage structures.
terms.example_zh: 过度沉降可能损坏结构。

lessons.title: 什么是钢结构？
lessons.content_en: Steel structure is a type of building structure. It uses steel beams and steel columns. Steel is strong and light. Many buildings use steel structures. Bridges also use steel. Steel structure is very important in construction.
lessons.content_zh: 钢结构是一种建筑结构类型。它使用钢梁和钢柱。钢材既坚固又轻盈。许多建筑物使用钢结构。桥梁也使用钢材。钢结构在建筑中非常重要。

lessons.title: 钢结构的优点
lessons.content_en: Steel has many advantages in construction. First, steel is very strong. Second, steel is light compared to concrete. Third, steel is ductile, which means it can bend without breaking. Fourth, steel can be recycled. These advantages make steel a popular choice for modern buildings.
lessons.content_zh: 钢材在建筑中有许多优点。首先，钢材非常坚固。其次，与混凝土相比，钢材很轻。第三，钢材具有延性，意味着它可以弯曲而不断裂。第四，钢材可以回收利用。这些优点使钢材成为现代建筑的热门选择。

lessons.title: 钢结构连接
lessons.content_en: There are two main types of connections in steel structures: welded connections and bolted connections. Welded connections are made by melting the steel parts together. This creates a strong and tight joint. Bolted connections use high-strength bolts to hold the steel members together. They are easier to assemble and disassemble.
lessons.content_zh: 钢结构中有两种主要的连接方式：焊接连接和螺栓连接。焊接连接通过熔化钢材部件将其连接在一起，形成牢固密封的节点。螺栓连接使用高强度螺栓将钢材连接起来。它们更容易组装和拆卸。

lessons.title: 焊接工艺
lessons.content_en: Welding is a common method for joining steel members. There are several welding processes used in steel construction. Shielded Metal Arc Welding uses a consumable electrode. Gas Metal Arc Welding uses a shielding gas. Flux Cored Arc Welding is efficient for thick plates. Submerged Arc Welding produces high-quality welds.
lessons.content_zh: 焊接是连接钢构件的常用方法。钢结构施工中有几种焊接工艺。焊条电弧焊使用消耗性焊丝。气体保护焊使用保护气体。药芯焊丝电弧焊对厚板效率高。埋弧焊产生高质量焊缝。

lessons.title: 荷载类型
lessons.content_en: Structures must be designed to resist various types of loads. Dead loads are permanent loads from the weight of the structure itself. Live loads are variable loads from occupants and furniture. Wind loads act horizontally on structures. Snow loads depend on climate and roof shape. Seismic loads result from earthquake ground motion.
lessons.content_zh: 结构必须设计成能够抵抗各种类型的荷载。恒荷载是结构自重的永久荷载。活荷载是使用者和家具的可变荷载。风荷载水平作用于结构上。雪荷载取决于气候和屋面形状。地震荷载来自地震地面运动。
lessons.vocabulary: load, dead load, live load, wind load, seismic

lessons.title: 结构分析
lessons.content_en: Structural analysis is a fundamental process in steel structure design. Engineers use mathematical models to predict how structures will behave under various loading conditions. The primary loads include dead loads, live loads, wind loads, and seismic loads. Finite element analysis is a powerful computational method used to simulate complex structural behaviors.
lessons.content_zh: 结构分析是钢结构设计的基本过程。工程师使用数学模型预测结构在各种荷载条件下的行为。主要荷载包括恒荷载、活荷载、风荷载和地震荷载。有限元分析是模拟复杂结构行为的强大计算方法。

lessons.title: 稳定性和屈曲
lessons.content_en: Stability is a critical consideration in steel structure design. Buckling is a failure mode where a structural member fails due to compressive stress exceeding its critical value. There are several types of buckling: flexural buckling, torsional buckling, and flexural-torsional buckling.
lessons.content_zh: 稳定性是钢结构设计中的关键考虑因素。屈曲是一种破坏模式，结构构件因压应力超过其临界值而失效。屈曲有几种类型：弯曲屈曲、扭转屈曲和弯扭屈曲。

lessons.title: 超高层钢结构
lessons.content_en: High-rise buildings require specialized structural systems. Steel frame systems with bracing or shear walls provide lateral resistance. Core-outrigger systems are commonly used in supertall buildings. The structural design must consider wind loads, seismic loads, and gravity loads.
lessons.content_zh: 超高层建筑需要专业的结构系统。带支撑或剪力墙的钢框架系统提供侧向抵抗力。核心筒-伸臂系统常用于超高层建筑。结构设计必须考虑风荷载、地震荷载和重力荷载。

lessons.title: 钢结构防腐
lessons.content_en: Steel structures require proper corrosion protection. The main methods include protective coatings, cathodic protection, and weathering steel. Protective coatings are the most common method. Regular inspection and maintenance are essential for long-term durability.
lessons.content_zh: 钢结构需要适当的防腐保护。主要方法包括防腐涂层、阴极保护和耐候钢。防腐涂层是最常见的方法。定期检查和维护对长期耐久性至关重要。

lessons.title: 钢结构施工
lessons.content_en: Steel construction follows a clear process. First, steel members are fabricated in the factory. Then, they are transported to the site. Next, cranes lift the steel pieces into position. Finally, workers connect the pieces with bolts or welds. This process is faster than traditional concrete construction.
lessons.content_zh: 钢结构施工遵循明确的流程。首先，钢材构件在工厂制作。然后，运送到现场。接着，起重机吊装钢材就位。最后，工人们用螺栓或焊接连接构件。这个过程比传统混凝土施工更快。

lessons.title: 有限元分析入门
lessons.content_en: Finite Element Analysis (FEA) is a computational method for analyzing complex structures. The structure is divided into small elements. Each element is analyzed mathematically. Computers calculate the behavior of the entire structure. FEA is essential for modern structural engineering.
lessons.content_zh: 有限元分析(FEA)是分析复杂结构的计算方法。结构被分割成小单元。每个单元被数学分析。计算机计算整个结构的性能。有限元分析是现代结构工程的核心。

lessons.title: 钢结构桥梁
lessons.content_en: Steel bridges are widely used due to their strength and flexibility. There are several types: beam bridges, truss bridges, arch bridges, suspension bridges, and cable-stayed bridges. Each type has its advantages for different spans and loads.
lessons.content_zh: 钢结构桥梁因其强度和灵活性而被广泛使用。有几种类型：梁桥、桁架桥、拱桥、悬索桥和斜拉桥。每种类型都有其适用于不同跨度和荷载的优点。

lastUpdate.title: FIDIC合同简介
lastUpdate.content_en: FIDIC stands for the International Federation of Consulting Engineers. FIDIC contracts are widely used in international construction projects. The Red Book is for construction, the Yellow Book is for plant and design-build, and the Silver Book is for EPC contracts. Understanding FIDIC is essential for engineers working abroad.
lastUpdate.content_zh: FIDIC代表国际咨询工程师联合会。FIDIC合同广泛应用于国际建筑项目。红皮书用于施工，黄皮书用于设备设施和设计-建造合同，银皮书用于EPC合同。了解FIDIC对在海外工作的工程师至关重要。

lastUpdate.title: FIDIC投标流程
lastUpdate.content_en: The FIDIC tender process involves several stages: obtaining tender documents, site visit, preparing the tender, submission, and evaluation. Tenderers must submit bid security along with their offer. The employer evaluates tenders based on technical and financial criteria.
lastUpdate.content_zh: FIDIC投标流程包括几个阶段：获取招标文件、现场考察、准备投标、提交和评标。投标人必须随投标文件提交投标保证金。业主根据技术性和财务性标准评标。

lastUpdate.title: FIDIC变更与索赔
lastUpdate.content_en: Under FIDIC, variations are instructed by the Engineer. Claims must be notified within 28 days. Contractors must prove causation and quantify losses. Time and cost are two main elements of claims. Proper documentation is crucial for successful claims.
lastUpdate.content_zh: 根据FIDIC，变更由工程师指令。索赔必须在28天内通知。承包商必须证明因果关系并量化损失。时间和费用是索赔的两个主要要素。适当的文档记录对成功索赔至关重要。

lastUpdate.title: FIDIC付款机制
lastUpdate.content_en: FIDIC uses monthly interim payments. The contractor submits application, engineer certifies, employer pays within 56 days. Retention money is withheld from each payment. Advance payment is paid at start, recoverable from subsequent payments.
lastUpdate.content_zh: FIDIC使用月度进度款。承包商提交申请，工程师认证，业主在56天内付款。每次付款扣留保留金。预付款在开工时支付，从后续款项中扣回。
lastUpdate.vocabulary: interim payment, retention, advance payment, certificate

lastUpdate.title: FIDIC缺陷责任
lastUpdate.content_en: The defects liability period is typically 12 months after taking over. The contractor must rectify defects during this period. If defects are not remedied, the employer can withhold retention money or engage others. Performance guarantee is released after defects are corrected.
lastUpdate.content_zh: 缺陷责任期通常为接收后12个月。承包商必须在此期间修复缺陷。如果缺陷未修复，业主可以扣留保留金或雇佣他人。缺陷纠正后释放履约保函。

lastUpdate.title: 国际工程英语
lastUpdate.content_en: International engineering projects require good English communication. Technical English differs from daily English. Key skills include writing reports, participating in meetings, and understanding contracts. Professional English can help engineers advance their careers globally.
lastUpdate.content_zh: 国际工程项目需要良好的英语交流。技术英语与日常英语不同。关键技能包括写报告、参加会议和理解合同。专业英语可以帮助工程师在全球推进职业发展。
